items.label: SpaceX
items.headline: SpaceX pioneered reusable rockets for space haulage but China’s Long March 10B is hot on Falcon 9’s trail
items.summary: SpaceX broke ahead with the marvel of rockets that could be reused. But it can’t take its space lead for granted. China’s Long March 10B hasn’t just succeeded with a terrestrial landing, it deployed an innovative mechanism for it.

items.label: Tesla
items.headline: (PHOTO) Elon Musk Tours Optimus Production Line in Fremont as Tesla Advances Humanoid Robot Development
items.summary: Elon Musk's recent visit to Tesla's Fremont factory showcased progress on the Optimus humanoid robot, emphasising its potential to transform manufacturing and service industries through advanced AI and robotics.
